narrative:
Westerville 2-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 842 registered voters, with 42.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
